description: This eye-catching bag from puma in striking black and blue is endlessly practical and multi-purpose. With a dedicated laptop pouch and stationary compartments, this backpack is ideal for work or college. On the other hand, the Sports-style shape, puma logo and copious space inside make this a great backpack for carrying your sports kit, or, really, anything else! If you're looking for one bag that meets all your different needs, you may have found it here &ndash and with a great shape and style to match. Height: 50cm Width: 35cm Made of 70% polyester and 30% nylon for strength, durability and easy-care Large main compartment with a padded laptop sleeve Medium sized front compartment with internal divided compartments for notebooks and pens, etc. Padded back for comfort and support Padded and adjustable straps for even distribution of weight High-visibility reflective tags for safety at night Easy-grip webbing tags on zippers for practical opening Care Wipe clean with a damp cloth when required Do not use detergent
